Requirements for Graduation: ☐Earn a C– or higher in each course required for the major ☐15 of the final 30 credits must be earned at the 300-400 level ☐At least 30 credits must be earned at UMD ☐Earn a minimum of 120 credits

☐12 upper level major credits must be earned at UMD ☐Earn a cumulative 2.0 GPA in all UMD coursework
